arts.ttl: Fabregas draws Inspiration from Simone Inzaghi and Thiago Motta
arts.sum: Cesc Fabregas, the former Barcelona and Arsenal midfielder now managing Como in Serie A, has opened up about his early experiences as a coach and the managers who inspire him. In an exclusive interview with SportMediaset, Fabregas reflected on his coaching journey and shared his thoughts on the current Serie A title race. “I’m at the beginning of my coaching career. I feel good, but I still have a lot to learn,” Fabregas admitted.
